economic_notes: TTI (Twatatya' Takenhas Inc.) is a 100% owned GBE investing in on-reserve and off-reserve business ventures. TTI holds 9.1% interest in MySmartSimulations Inc. (impaired). Subsequent to year end, TTI formed subsidiary Onyota'a:ka Kahsatst^sla' Ltd. to own/operate a community solar microgrid. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions restricted to community development, health, education, cultural and economic development. Community Benefit Agreement reserve from Greenlane funding.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidated entity includes Oneida Long Term Care Home (TSI'Nu:Yoyantle'Na'Tuhuwatisni). Twatatya' Takenhas Inc. (TTI) accounted for by modified equity method as GBE. Land held by Chabre Holdings Inc. as bare trustee (100% owned). Current liabilities include accounts payable $5,041,910 plus deposits $44,747. OSR calculated as total revenue $39,497,661 minus government transfers per Note 20 operating transfers of $32,583,151 = $6,914,510. Deferred revenue movement included in revenue presentation. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Emergency services expenses $2,715,812; Community development $8,204,578; Long term care facility $4,512,098 also reported as program segments.
